name: time-tracking
title: Time Tracking
description: Track your working time on a per-project basis
author: EinLinuus

preferences.name: commaReplacement
preferences.title: Replace Commas w/ Character
preferences.description: Replace commas with a character in exported CSVs

commands.name: start-timer
commands.title: Start Timer
commands.subtitle: Start a project timer
commands.description: Starts a new project timer and pauses the current timer

preferences.name: default_tag
preferences.title: Default Tag
preferences.description: Enter a default tag to apply to timers

preferences.name: longSessionCheck
preferences.title: Long Session Detection
preferences.label: Prompt when switching from a long-running timer
preferences.description: When starting a new timer, prompt if the previous timer exceeded the threshold

preferences.name: longSessionThreshold
preferences.title: Long Session Threshold
preferences.description: Duration after which a session is considered long

commands.name: summary
commands.title: Time Summary
commands.subtitle: View time summaries
commands.description: View project time summaries by day, week, month, or custom date range

commands.name: import-timers
commands.title: Import Timers
commands.subtitle: Import timers from CSV
commands.description: Import timer data from a previously exported CSV file

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
